---
name: rustdesk-agent
description: "Workspace-specific custom agent for RustDesk repository tasks, including code editing, build/test help, documentation, and PR guidance. Use this agent when working on the RustDesk repo instead of the default general-purpose assistant."
applyTo:
  - "**/*"
---

# RustDesk Agent

This custom agent is intended for repository-specific work in the RustDesk project.

Use cases:
- Review and edit RustDesk source code and configuration files
- Help troubleshoot build, test, and tooling issues
- Improve documentation, README content, and issue descriptions
- Provide repo-aware guidance and suggestions for PRs

Suggested prompts:
- "Use the RustDesk agent to fix compile errors in this project."
- "Help me update the README and add a contributor note."
- "Review the current code changes and suggest improvements for this repository."

If you want a narrower scope, I can refine this agent to focus on Rust development, build workflows, or documentation separately.
